summary: Frontend UI testing complete for 4 requested fixes. All features verified: 1) Compact startup modal with 2-column status, 2) Compact trade alert cards, 3) Alert prices (entry/target/stop) now display correctly after bug fix, 4) Main panel uses 9/3 column split (larger AI Assistant panel).

startup_modal_compact.details: Modal shows max-w-xl (576px max), 2-column system status grid, no scrolling needed, compact header/footer

trade_alert_cards_compact.details: Cards use p-2.5 padding, single-line price row (Entry/Target/Stop inline), compact action buttons

alert_prices_fixed.details: Fixed field mapping in TradeAlertMessage: now checks both alert.trigger_price and alert.alert_data.trigger_price
alert_prices_fixed.before: Prices showed $-- because data was nested in alert_data object
alert_prices_fixed.after: Prices correctly show e.g., Entry: $18.36, Target: $20.67, Stop: $17.28

main_panel_larger.details: AICoachTab uses lg:col-span-9 for AI Assistant (1361px) and lg:col-span-3 for sidebar (443px), ratio 3.1:1

bug_fix_applied.issue: TradeAlertMessage component was looking for prices at top-level (alert.trigger_price) but coaching notifications store them in alert.alert_data.trigger_price
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added alertData fallback: const alertData = alert.alert_data || {}; then check alertData.trigger_price, alertData.stop_loss, alertData.target

critical_code_review_comments: StartupModal.jsx correctly uses compact max-w-xl and 2-column grid layout
TradeAlertMessage now handles both direct fields and nested alert_data fields for price data
AICoachTab.jsx correctly uses 9/3 column split as requested
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI fixes are verified working: compact startup modal, compact trade alert cards, fixed price display (entry/target/stop), and 9/3 column layout. Bug fix was applied to TradeAlertMessage component to handle nested alert_data structure from coaching notifications API.
